name: write-phased
description: Guides inline 2-phase document/code writing: the caller writes the skeleton first, then fills and finalizes in the same flow. Triggers on: "write-phased", "문서 작성", "작성해줘", "만들어줘", "코드 작성", "파일 생성", "구현해줘", "write a document", "create a file", "generate code", "implement", or any request to produce a markdown document, code file, config file, or technical writing.
